title: オークスの後に・ヒロインは

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(I gave it everything I had, but I wasn't able to
win...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But... But!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Bouncing back from defeat to claim victory is a
common trope!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Princess…

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text:
I just know you'll do better in the next race! I
can't wait to see you win!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Indeed! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess keeps her head held high and pushes
onward. Nobody can stand in my path!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No good story is without its twists and turns. It
simply wasn't the right time for my victory.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But since I'm the heroine of this story, I have to
make sure...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That there'll be a happy ending!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Princess! I know you can win the
next one!

text_block_list.name: Girls
text_block_list.text: Go, Princess, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she lost, Kawakami Princess remains
confident as she's showered by encouraging
cheers.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Why are they acting like she's the only star of this
race? The rest of the racers tried just as hard...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, while I'm having Kawakami Princess rest
in the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. That was a great race out there today. I work on the show Meet the Racers!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you the one who made that special
promo video?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Every door, every wall, and every competitor
crumbles! The Princess has entered the fray!"

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! And so, I wanted to come and
consult with you about something.

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
You were really amazing out there, which is why I
was hoping you'd consider doing a collaboration
with our show!

text_block_list.name: TV Station Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Maybe calling it a special would be more fitting.
I'd like to put together a live broadcast showing
you speak passionately about your next
objective!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...My next objective.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I want to enter the Shuka Sho next.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's the last race of the Tiara tour. I've lost the
Japanese Oaks, but that doesn't mean I'll let
anyone else take the final prize.
choice_data_list: You bet. The Shuka Sho it is.
You bet. The Shuka Sho it is.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll come back from this defeat and claim victory!
Now's the time to show my grit and
determination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Kawakami Princess zealously proclaims her
goal, the TV station staff member watches with a
gentle smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our next objective is the Shuka Sho.
